==Ghost Zadako ♀==
A famous actress in the ghost world, dedicated to scaring people to death!

===Begin Friendship===
To obtain Ghost Zadako, fully defeat [[Hitmen|Hitman No.8]]. She will then appear in the computer in the [[Home Base|Gene Room]] and ask for 1 {{Relink|Incense|orange}}. This rewards the {{Relink|Hitman No.8 License|green}} and initiates a mail-chain with Ghost Zadako.

=== ★☆☆ > ★★☆===
After 23 letters back and forth, Ghost Zadako will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift {{RewardIconWithText|Guanyin Tea}} +3. Each one is used to gain {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +200.

===★★☆ > ★★★===
After 11 letters back and forth, Ghost Zadako will move in permanently with her minion, Wraith.

==Rent==
[[File:Ghost Zadako rent.png|frameless|left]]

Ghost Zadako rent is collected on '''Thursday''' and found as talismans on the right side of the room.

 '''Normal Rent''': A random soul of {{RewardIconWithText|4h Soul Chaos|red}} or {{RewardIconWithText|4h Soul Order}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|8h Soul Chaos, (Soul of Sorrowful Dead)|red}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Scrolls!

{| class="wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Relic Tier
! colspan="3" |Reward
|-
!Blue Relics
!Purple Relics
!Orange Relics
|-
|★
|Novice Scroll +5
|Expert Scroll +5
|Master Scroll +5
|-
|★★
|Novice Scroll +5
|Expert Scroll +5
|Master Scroll +5
|-
|★★★
|Novice Scroll +5
|Expert Scroll +5
|Master Scroll +5
|-
|★★★★
|Novice Scroll +10
|Expert Scroll +10
|Master Scroll +10
|-
|★★★★★
|
|Expert Scroll +15
|Master Scroll +15
|-
|★★★★★★
|
|
|Master Scroll +20
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Requiem}}{{Relink|Requiem}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Ranjyatai Incense}}{{Relink|Ranjyatai Incense}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Glass Coffin}}{{Relink|Glass Coffin}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Chinchorro Mummy}}{{Relink|Chinchorro Mummy}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Shroud of Turin}}{{Relink|Shroud of Turin}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Blood of Cain}}{{Relink|Blood of Cain}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|The Black Book}}{{Relink|The Black Book}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|AH602}}{{Relink|AH602}}
|}

== Zadako's Curse of Death==
The ghost above all! With an indescribable curse technique, Ghost Zadako kills skillfully without leaving a trace!

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FAME +5||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +30s 
|-
|2||180||2k||FAME +10||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +1m30s 
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FAME +15||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +2m
|-
|4||200||8k||FAME +20||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +2m30s
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FAME +25||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +3m
|-
|6||220||18k||FAME +30||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +3m30s
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FAME +35||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +4m
|-
|8||240||32k||FAME +40||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +4m30s
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FAME +45||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +5m
|-
|10||260||50k||FAME +50||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +5m30s
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FAME +55||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +6m
|-
|12||285||72k||FAME +60||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +6m30s
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FAME +65||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +7m
|-
|14||315||98k||FAME +70||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +7m30s
|-
|15||330||112k||FAME +75||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +8m
|-
|16||345||123k||FAME +80||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +8m30s
|-
|17||360||144k||FAME +85||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +9m
|-
|18||375||162k||FAME +90||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +9m30s
|-
|19||390||180k||FAME +95||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +10m
|-
|20||400||200k||FAME +100||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +10m30s
|-
|21||420||220k||FAME +105||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +11m
|-
|22||440||242k||FAME +110||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +11m30s
|-
|23||460||264k||FAME +115||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +12m
|-
|24||480||285k||FAME +120||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +12m30s
|-
|25||500||309k||FAME +125||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +13m
|-
|26||520||333k||FAME +130||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +13m30s
|-
|27||540||357k||FAME +135||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +14m
|-
|28||560||381k||FAME +140||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +14m30s
|-
|29||580||405k||FAME +145||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +15m
|-
|30||600||429k||FAME +150||Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +15m30s
|}

==Commander ==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Zadako's Curse of Death is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +10
|-
|2||4k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +20
|-
|3||6k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +30
|-
|4||8k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +40
|-
|5||10k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +50
|-
|6||12k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +60
|-
|7||14k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +70
|-
|8||16k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +80
|-
|9||18k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +90
|-
|10||20k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +100
|-
|11||22k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +110
|-
|12||24k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +120
|-
|13||26k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +130
|-
|14||28k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +140
|-
|15||30k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +150
|-
|16||32k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +160
|-
|17||34k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +170
|-
|18||36k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +180
|-
|19||38k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +190
|-
|20||40k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +200
|-
|21||42k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +210
|-
|22||44k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +220
|-
|23||46k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +230
|-
|24||48k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +240
|-
|25||50k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +250
|-
|26||55k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +260
|-
|27||60k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +270
|-
|28||65k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +280
|-
|29||70k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +290
|-
|30||75k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Ghost Zadako specializes in '''Zombie Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Zombie is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Wraith==
Special Ability - Spirited Body: Per 10 Wraiths in battle, Troop DEF +10 (x minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Wraiths!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Requiem}}<br>{{relink|Requiem}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Ranjyatai Incense}}<br>{{relink|Ranjyatai Incense}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Glass Coffin}}<br>{{relink|Glass Coffin}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Chinchorro Mummy}}<br>{{relink|Chinchorro Mummy}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Shroud of Turin}}<br>{{relink|Shroud of Turin}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4% 
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Blood of Cain}}<br>{{relink|Blood of Cain}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|The Black Book}}<br>{{relink|The Black Book}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|AH602}}<br>{{relink|AH602}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Zombie Gene Boost]]
[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
